# AI Study-to-Work Coach Checklist

Version: `1.0.0`

| Status | Rule | Evidence |
|---|---|---|
| student_partner_required | Every participant must be an eligible student; working professionals enrolled in degree programs are not eligible. | `docs/ELIGIBILITY_STUDENT_CHECKLIST.md` |
| student_partner_required | Team must include 2-5 registered Devpost members; no solo final submission. | `docs/ELIGIBILITY_STUDENT_CHECKLIST.md` |
| ready_for_qualifier | Team must complete the AI Readiness Qualifier and receive an approval code. | `submission/qualifier_response_template.md` |
| guarded | Substantial competitive build work must happen during June 14-21, 2026. | `docs/HACKATHON_PLAN.md` |
| done | Submission must explain AI architecture, human-in-loop design, responsible AI guardrails, tools, and data. | `docs/PRODUCT_AI_IDEA.md` |
| ready | Final Devpost packet must include a working demo or walkthrough and a 3-5 minute pitch video. | `docs/VIDEO_OUTLINE.md` |
| ready_for_authorized_session | WAIBAv playbooks prepare Devpost and qualifier drafts while preserving authorized final-submit gates. | `automation/waiba` |

Deadline: 2026-06-21 23:59 ET
